data.title: Cypherpunk Technologies Announces Planned Board Leadership Transitions
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Cypherpunk Technologies ( (CYPH) ) is now available.

On April 7, 2026, Cypherpunk Technologies said Class III directors Dr. Christopher Mirabelli and Dr. Joseph Loscalzo notified the company of their plans to retire from the Board and not stand for re‑election at the 2026 Annual Meeting, submitting resignations effective immediately before that meeting. The same day, Class I directors Dr. Richard Schilsky and Dr. James Cavanaugh also disclosed plans to retire effective immediately prior to the 2026 Annual Meeting, with the company emphasizing that none of the departures stemmed from disagreements over operations, policies or practices, signaling an orderly leadership transition in its boardroom.

The Board noted that Drs. Cavanaugh, Loscalzo, Mirabelli and Schilsky will also step down from their committee roles at the time of retirement tied to the 2026 Annual Meeting. By framing the exits as amicable and expressing gratitude for the directors’ years of service, Cypherpunk Technologies presented the moves as a planned refresh of its governance rather than a response to internal conflict, an important distinction for investors monitoring board stability and strategic continuity.

The most recent analyst rating on (CYPH) stock is a Hold with a $0.64 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cypherpunk Technologies stock, see the CYPH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CYPH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CYPH is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak operating fundamentals (near-zero revenue, ongoing operating losses, and continued cash burn), despite a notably strong low-debt balance sheet. Additional pressure comes from the Nasdaq minimum bid compliance risk, while valuation is not supportive due to a negative P/E and no provided dividend yield; technicals are neutral due to missing indicators.

To see Spark’s full report on CYPH stock, click here.

More about Cypherpunk Technologies

Cypherpunk Technologies Inc. operates in the technology sector, though this disclosure focuses on its corporate governance rather than its specific products or services. The company is publicly held and overseen by a Board of Directors structured in classes, reflecting a staggered governance model designed to provide continuity of oversight for shareholders and management.

Average Trading Volume: 2,496,127

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $89.89M

data.title: Boston Beer Faces $175.5 Million Jury Verdict Expense
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Boston Beer ( (SAM) ) has shared an update.

On December 31, 2022, Ardagh Metal Packaging USA Corp. sued Boston Beer in the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Illinois, alleging the brewer failed to meet contractual minimum purchase volumes for certain aluminum beverage cans between 2021 and 2025. On April 6, 2026, a jury returned a verdict in Ardagh’s favor, awarding approximately $175.5 million in damages after offsetting Boston Beer’s counterclaim, with judgment still pending and post-trial motions yet to be filed.

Boston Beer, which continues to deny breaching the contract, plans to pursue post-trial and appellate remedies but expects to record a one-time pre-tax litigation expense of about $175.5 million plus any accrued interest in its upcoming first-quarter 2026 results due April 30. The company said it intends to fund any required payment from its $223.4 million cash balance as of December 27, 2025 and an undrawn $150 million credit line, does not expect a material impact on operating plans, and still plans to maintain its up-to-$25 million share repurchase program running from March 30 to June 26, 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (SAM) stock is a Hold with a $245.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Boston Beer stock, see the SAM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SAM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SAM is a Outperform.

The score is led by strong financial quality (low leverage and improved 2025 cash generation) and tangible operational/margin progress, partially offset by cautious 2026 volume guidance and cost headwinds (tariffs/inputs). Technicals are neutral-to-mixed and valuation is fair rather than compelling, keeping the overall rating in the moderately positive range.

To see Spark’s full report on SAM stock, click here.

More about Boston Beer

Boston Beer Company operates in the alcoholic beverage industry, best known for its Samuel Adams beer and a portfolio of craft beers, hard seltzers, and other alcoholic drinks targeted primarily at the U.S. market. The company competes in the premium and craft segments, relying on contracted packaging suppliers such as aluminum can manufacturers to support its distribution and growth strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 175,876

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.72B

For a thorough assessment of SAM stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Versamet Royalties Closes Cornerstone Gold Stream Deal on Eskay Creek
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Versamet Royalties Corp. ( (TSE:VMET) ) has issued an update.

Versamet Royalties has closed its acquisition of a 3.52% gold stream tied to production from the Eskay Creek gold-silver project in Canada, buying the interest from funds managed by Orion Resource Partners and affiliates of Blackstone. The deal was financed with a US$340 million cash payment and the issuance of just over two million common shares, underpinned by an expanded credit facility totaling US$400 million from Bank of Montreal and National Bank of Canada.

Under the gold stream agreement, Versamet will receive 3.52% of payable gold for the life of the mine in exchange for ongoing payments equal to 10% of the spot gold price on delivery. The uncapped stream, backed by security over Eskay Creek’s assets and including minimum delivery protections, is expected to provide meaningful long-term cash flow given projected mine output averaging more than 300,000 ounces of gold annually in the first five years and about 230,000 ounces over an initial 12-year life.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:VMET) stock is a Buy with a C$18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Versamet Royalties Corp. stock, see the TSE:VMET Stock Forecast page.

More about Versamet Royalties Corp.

Versamet Royalties Corporation is an emerging mid-tier precious metals royalty and streaming company focused on acquiring high-quality gold and silver assets to create long-term per-share value. The company’s common shares trade on both the NASDAQ and Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol VMET, positioning it in North American capital markets with a focus on precious metals exposure for investors.

Average Trading Volume: 125,418

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$1.16B

See more insights into VMET stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: DLP Resources Maps Large Porphyry-Style Magnetic Body at Esperanza Project in Peru
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from DLP Resources ( (TSE:DLP) ).

DLP Resources has identified a substantial 4.4 cubic kilometre magnetic body at its Esperanza porphyry copper-molybdenum project in southern Peru, based on three-dimensional inversion of drone aeromagnetic data covering 16.86 square kilometres. The magnetic body’s geometry aligns closely with a typical porphyry ore-forming model, confirming a large, concealed intrusive system at depth.

Integrated geological mapping, rock chip geochemistry, alteration studies and magnetic modelling outline coincident anomalies over roughly four by four kilometres that resemble world-class deposits like Cerro Verde and Toquepala in scale and zoning. Elevated Sr/Y ratios, favourable metal associations and structural controls indicate a fertile, large-scale porphyry system whose copper-molybdenum core is likely not exposed at surface, guiding future drilling targets and potentially enhancing the project’s exploration significance within the region.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:DLP) stock is a Buy with a C$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on DLP Resources stock, see the TSE:DLP Stock Forecast page.

More about DLP Resources

DLP Resources Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on copper and molybdenum projects, with a 100% interest in the 22,500-hectare Esperanza porphyry copper-molybdenum project in southern Peru. The project lies near major producing operations, including the Cerro Verde and Chapi copper mines, positioning DLP within a well-endowed Andean copper belt.

Average Trading Volume: 92,504

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$45.4M

data.title: Hawaiian Electric Begins Payments Under Maui Wildfire Settlement
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hawaiian Electric ( (HE) ) has issued an update.

On April 10, 2026, Hawaiian Electric Industries and Hawaiian Electric triggered payment under settlement agreements dated November 1, 2024, resolving tort-related claims from the 2023 Maui windstorm and wildfires. This followed a December 30, 2025 judgment on subrogation claims by over 200 insurers becoming final and unappealable after all insurers dismissed their appeals with prejudice.

The companies have now authorized the first of four equal annual installments of $479 million, funded from a September 2024 equity offering and held in a special purpose vehicle until all payment conditions were satisfied. With the initial payment released and all conditions met, the settlement releases are now effective, providing greater legal certainty for the utilities and wildfire claimants and clarifying a major financial obligation over a defined multi-year period.

The most recent analyst rating on (HE) stock is a Hold with a $14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hawaiian Electric stock, see the HE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HE is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance quality (earnings volatility and balance-sheet strain despite improving cash flow). Technicals are neutral-to-soft near term, while valuation is reasonable. Earnings-call factors provide some support due to profitability and legal progress, but financing and execution risks remain meaningful.

To see Spark’s full report on HE stock, click here.

More about Hawaiian Electric

Hawaiian Electric Industries, Inc. and its subsidiary Hawaiian Electric Company, Inc. operate in the regulated electric utility industry, providing power generation, transmission and distribution services in Hawaii. The companies serve residential, commercial and institutional customers across the islands, making them central to the state’s energy infrastructure and its transition and resilience initiatives.

data.title: Livento Group Secures New Convertible Debt Financing Agreement
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Livento Group ( (LIVG) ).

On September 11, 2025, Livento Group Inc. entered into a $30,000 financing agreement with AES Capital Management, LLC, bearing annual interest of 8% and maturing on September 11, 2026. The note includes a conversion feature allowing any unpaid amounts to be converted into common shares at a 35% discount to a price derived from the lowest trading prices over three separate days, potentially leading to shareholder dilution and signaling continued dependence on external financing.

This structure may provide Livento Group with short-term liquidity while shifting some risk to equity holders through possible future stock issuance at a discounted valuation. The reliance on convertible debt could affect the company’s capital structure and share performance, particularly if market conditions or trading prices move unfavorably for existing shareholders before the note’s maturity.

More about Livento Group

Livento Group Inc., formerly NuGene International, Inc., is a publicly traded company, though the specific industry and core business activities are not detailed in the release. The company issues common shares with a par value of $0.0001, indicating it relies on equity financing as part of its capital structure.

data.title: Sailfish Royalty Nets US$168 Million From Sale of Nevada Royalties to OR Royalties
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Sailfish Royalty ( (TSE:FISH) ) is now available.

Sailfish Royalty has closed the sale of its wholly owned subsidiary Terraco Gold, which holds royalties on the Spring Valley gold project and the Moonlight property in Nevada, to OR Royalties Inc. for after‑tax cash proceeds of US$168 million. The transaction diversifies Sailfish’s portfolio by reducing concentration risk and significantly bolsters its cash reserves, positioning the company to redeploy capital into new precious metals streams and royalties while supporting its strategy of maintaining a robust dividend to shareholders.

Advisers on the deal included National Bank Financial as financial advisor, INFOR Financial Group as strategic advisor, and DuMoulin Black as legal counsel. By monetizing the Nevada royalties at a time management views as opportunistic, Sailfish seeks to enhance financial flexibility and reinforce its positioning as an income‑focused royalty player in the mining sector, with implications for future deal‑making and potential returns to investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:FISH) stock is a Buy with a C$4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sailfish Royalty stock, see the TSE:FISH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FISH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FISH is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved TTM profitability and a very strong, low-leverage balance sheet, partially offset by weak free cash flow and inconsistent cash conversion. Technicals are mildly supportive, while valuation is a notable drag due to the very high P/E despite a modest dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on FISH stock, click here.

More about Sailfish Royalty

Sailfish Royalty Corp. is a precious metals royalty and streaming company focused on gold and silver assets across the Americas. Its core portfolio includes a gold stream equivalent to a 3% net smelter return on the San Albino gold mine and a 2% royalty on surrounding ground in Nicaragua, a 2% royalty on the Gavilanes Silver Project in Mexico, and an 11‑year gold stream with Mako Mining Corp.

Ensurge Micropower has published its 2025 Annual Report and Financial Statements, replacing an earlier announcement and making the documents available on its website. data.title: Bonanza Mining to Settle $178,000 in Debt Through Share Issuance
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Bonanza Mining Corporation ( (TSE:BNZ) ).

Bonanza Mining Corporation has reached agreements with certain insiders and arm’s-length creditors to settle $178,516.81 of outstanding debt through the issuance of 1,785,168 common shares at a deemed price of $0.10 per share. The share-based settlements, which remain subject to regulatory acceptance, will reduce the company’s liabilities and modestly increase its equity base, signaling an effort to improve its balance sheet and financial flexibility for future operations.

This conversion of debt to equity may ease short-term cash pressures by avoiding immediate cash repayments to creditors, while slightly diluting existing shareholders as new shares are issued. The move underscores the company’s reliance on capital markets and balance-sheet restructuring tools that are common among junior mining issuers seeking to preserve cash for exploration and project development activities.

More about Bonanza Mining Corporation

Bonanza Mining Corporation is a Vancouver-based mining company listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol BNZ. The company operates in the resource exploration and mining sector, focusing on generating value for shareholders through the development and optimization of its mineral assets.
